name: Tony Goldwyn via HillaryClinton.com
subject: Coffee?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
| Friend --

I have been passionate about Hillary’s campaign for a long time. She is the toughest, smartest, and kindest candidate we could wish for, and I know she’s got what it takes to be president. (It isn’t an easy job -- except maybe when the Oval Office is on a soundstage!)

I am so grateful to supporters like you who are working your hearts out to help elect Hillary -- especially in a crucial state like Virginia. And I would love the chance to meet you and thank you in person!

Would you like to join me in Alexandria for a cup of joe and a chat? **Just text “COFFEE” to 47246 to be automatically entered for a chance to win.**

I have two daughters, and I've watched them grow from wide-eyed little girls into beautiful and brilliant young women. There’s nothing I care about more than seeing them reach their potential, happy and secure in their lives.

The Hillary I know will fight for the causes that matter to THEM -- equal pay, climate change, family leave, social justice, and economic freedom. She will fight for them in Washington and around the world every single day. And she will make decisions that will ensure their futures are brighter than a bank of spotlights.

I so look forward to meeting you and hearing the reasons why this election matters to YOU. We may even have time for a selfie!

**Will you join me? Text COFFEE to 47246 -- or add your phone number at this page -- to be automatically entered for a chance to win:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks -- and I hope I get to meet you soon!

Tony

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

| ***No purchase, payment, contribution, or signing up to receive texts is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/30/16 at 12:00 p.m. (all times Eastern Time) and 7/4/16 at 12:00 p.m. Enter by texting “COFFEE” to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Or visit [http://hrc.io/29gW9Nz](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to meet and have a coffee with Tony Goldwyn in Northern Virginia on 7/6/16 (approx. value of prize: $20). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules [http://hrc.io/29gWDD4](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU4OTM5MjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzE4NjMyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Our goal
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Thank you. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4373/1c469400/62b12a0/356ce35/3830351644/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdfjty?utm_source=ema_2016-07-02_06ty_nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-02_06ty_nd&utm_campaign=06ty&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Our end-of-quarter goal was to raise $250,000. Because of you and your support, not only did we MEET our goal -- **We BEAT our goal.** Not only are we running a campaign focused on the issues that matter to hard-working Wisconsin families -- we're showing the Koch brothers and right-wing special interest groups that checks from a couple right-wing billionaires cannot beat the massive grassroots force they're up against. We couldn't have done it without you. Thank you again. Sincerely, Russ | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4373/1c469400/62b12a0/356ce35/3830351644/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdfjty?utm_source=ema_2016-07-02_06ty_nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-02_06ty_nd&utm_campaign=06ty&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4373/1c469400/62b12a0/356ce30/3830351644/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4373/1c469400/62b12a0/356ce31/3830351644/VEsA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: Hamilton
body:
One last time | Friend --

What time is it? SHOWTIME!

Hillary is taking a lucky supporter to see _Hamilton_ on Broadway, and you should definitely not throw away your shot to win -- the contest will be OVER FOREVER tomorrow at midnight! **[All you have to do is add your name for a chance for you and a guest to meet Hillary at the theater and see the show.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Trust me, you’ll tell the story of this night for the rest of your life -- history is happening, and you have a chance to meet the woman who could be our next president in the greatest city in the world.

I don’t see how anyone could say no to this -- but don’t wait for it, because the contest closes tomorrow at midnight. So I’m going to ask you one last time: **Will you add your name for a chance to be in the room where it happens?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks, and good luck!

I have the honor to be your obedient servant,

Y. Car

Yahel Carmon
Digital Analyst
Hillary for America

P. S. I worked non-stop to get as many Hamilton-lyric jokes as I could into this email. What did I miss?

|
**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary and Democrats down the ticket -- and be automatically entered to meet her at a performance of _Hamilton_ :**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

******No purchase, payment, contribution, or signing up to receive texts is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/17/16 at 12:00 a.m. (all times Eastern) and 7/03/16 at 11:59 p.m. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate, or enter by texting HAMILTON to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free without contributing or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Hamilton in New York City as well as round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the New York City area and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $3500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185-5256.

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0)** Paid for by Hillary Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Hillary for America, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AR, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, IA, KS, KY, LA, ME, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NV, NH, NJ, NM, NC, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, WV, WI, and WY.

**Contributions or gifts to Hillary Victory Fund are not tax deductible.** This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 1366, Merrifield, VA 22116-9559 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU4OTQzODkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQwMzQ2ODU2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
